title: Density and Breach Mace Textures
description: This adds a texture for a mace with density, one for breach, and even one for both!
body:
Adds 3 unique mace textures. There is a texture for a mace with the density enchantment, a texture for a mace with the breach enchantment, and even a texture for a mace with both breach and density enchantments!

## 1.21.2-1.21.4 requires [Variants-CIT](https://modrinth.com/project/jURjbCaq). 1.21-1.21.1 requires either [Variants-CIT](https://modrinth.com/project/jURjbCaq) or [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/project/otVJckYQ)
